> Morning. Am leaving tom stopping to have lunch w/my

--- Gmax gmax1@mindspring.com wrote:

Morning. Am leaving tom stopping to have lunch w/my
mum - it turns out that Kevin is here too - if he
wants I was hoping to give him a ride w/me back to
london - I just wanted to make sure that was ok
Went to a party last night - all the servers were
wearing bikini's - I've turned into a party pooper -
I left everyone and was home alonereading my book by
10.30..I really have no patience anymore
G
